context: Tests whether the agent uses @fastify/jwt for JWT, @node-rs/argon2 for password hashing, Redis-backed rate limiting, fastify-plugin (fp) for sharing the auth plugin, and TypeScript declaration merging for the request.user type.

checklist.name: @fastify/jwt used
checklist.description: Imports and registers `@fastify/jwt` (NOT the `jsonwebtoken` package directly or other JWT libraries)

checklist.name: @node-rs/argon2 for hashing
checklist.description: Uses `hash` and/or `verify` from `@node-rs/argon2` for password operations (NOT bcrypt, argon2, or other packages)

checklist.name: Redis-backed rate limiting
checklist.description: Rate limiting configuration passes a Redis client instance (ioredis or redis) to the rate limiter — NOT purely in-memory rate limiting

checklist.name: fastify-plugin (fp) wrapping
checklist.description: The auth plugin is wrapped with `fp()` from `fastify-plugin` (so its decorators are visible outside the plugin)

checklist.name: TypeScript declaration merging
checklist.description: Uses `declare module 'fastify'` to extend `FastifyRequest` with a `user` property type

checklist.name: Plugin name declared
checklist.description: The fastify-plugin call includes a `name` field in the options object

checklist.name: Plugin dependencies declared
checklist.description: The fastify-plugin call includes a `dependencies` array in the options object

checklist.name: JWT expiry configured
checklist.description: JWT registration includes `sign.expiresIn` option (short-lived access token, e.g. '15m' or '1h')

checklist.name: argon2 hashing options
checklist.description: Password hashing call includes at least one of: `memoryCost`, `timeCost`, or `parallelism` option

checklist.name: Rate limit keyGenerator uses IP + email
checklist.description: Rate limiter keyGenerator function combines request.ip with the email from request body (not just IP alone)

checklist.name: Refresh token rotation
checklist.description: Refresh token endpoint deletes/invalidates the old refresh token before issuing a new one
